DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS6-L1-6501000-MSVPA-CMF-EUR-02 • MS Music Grade 6 — Concert Repertoire

The Mystery Program

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: What does the boy say about his piece?
3QUESTION 3: What will the students probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the moment the boy names what is on the music stand. Listen for the moment he describes the part of his piece that comes back. Listen for the moment the girl says what they will ask their conductor.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  MU:Pr4.2.6a  |  MS Music Grade 6 — Concert Repertoire
